name: Online Image Component
description: Instructions for displaying images downloaded at runtime in ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: Specifies how to encode image internally.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: Redownload the image when the specified time has elapsed. Defaults to `never` (i.e. the update component action needs to be called manually).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID with which you will be able to reference the image later in your display code.

config_entries.label: Format
config_entries.description: The format that the image is encoded with.

config_entries.label: Placeholder
config_entries.description: ID of another [image](https://esphome.io/components/image/) to display while the downloaded image is not yet ready. This placeholder image will **not** be resized; regardless of the `resize` option value for the `online_image`.

config_entries.label: URL
config_entries.description: The URL where the image will be downloaded from.

config_entries.label: Buffer Size
config_entries.description: Explicitly specify the size of the buffer where the image chunks are being downloaded while decoding. The default value (65536) should be OK for most use cases, but you can try to reduce the size for slow connections, to avoid watchdog timeouts.

config_entries.label: Byte Order
config_entries.description: For RGB565 images, the pixels are converted to 16 bit values. By default these will be stored in little endian byte order (LSB first), but you can override this by setting `byte_order` to `big_endian`. Options are `little_endian` (default) and `big_endian`. Not applicable to other image formats.

config_entries.label: Request Headers
config_entries.description: Map of HTTP headers. Values are [templatable](https://esphome.io/automations/templates).

config_entries.label: Resize
config_entries.description: If set, this will resize the image to fit inside the given dimensions `WIDTHxHEIGHT` and preserve the aspect ratio.

config_entries.label: Transparency
config_entries.description: If set the alpha channel of the input image will be taken into account. The possible values are `opaque` (default), `chroma_key` and `alpha_channel`. See the discussion on transparency in the [image component](https://esphome.io/components/image#transparency-options).
